description: Aiwyn Tax, formerly Column Tax, is a tax calculation and filing product used by accounting firms and embedded-finance partners. It provides tax preparation and filing capabilities and is now offered as a Claude connector/MCP-backed integration.
summary: columnapi.com exposes a known remote MCP server for Aiwyn Tax at https://mcp.columnapi.com/mcp; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation could be verified on the columnapi.com domain.
